LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENT ENTRUSTMENT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THAT CLAIM IS PROPERLY CHARACTERIZED AS A DIRECT CLAIM AGAINST CCSF AND PLAINTIFF FAILS TO HIGHLIGHT A STATUTORY BASIS TO SUPPORT THE CLAIM IN COMPLIANCE WITH GOV'T CODE 815. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; COURT REPORTER: MARIA A. TORREANO, CSR#8600, E-MAIL: MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM (302/EPS)
